details: Happy 2nd Month Anniversary na kubb! 🌙✨
Two whole months...
It feels like it went by so fast 😭
But also like I've known you forever
Do you remember that thing we laughed about until we couldn't breathe? 😂
I still think about it sometimes and just smile alone like an idiot 🙃
This month was different from the first...
The first month I was still nervous around you haha
But now I feel so comfortable with you
Like I can just be myself — even when I'm weird 🙈
I love that about us
Thank you for not running away from my chaos 😂❤️
Seriously though na Noey...
Every morning I wake up and the first thing I think about is you
That's how I know you're different from anyone I've ever met
Are you free later? I want to talk to you 🥺
That's exactly what I love to hear 🥺❤️
Okay then... I just want to say one more thing
Month 1 I fell for you.
Month 2 I fell harder.
I can't wait to see what Month 3 feels like 😍
Happy 2nd Anniversary na teeruk 💕
I love you, Noey. More than I can put into words.
I AM cheesy okay don't judge me 😤😂
It's your fault for being so loveable!!!
Anyway... 🙈
I just wanted you to know that these two months have meant everything to me
Every single text, every late night call, every shared laugh
I keep them all na
Happy 2nd Month Anniversary, Noey 🌙
I love you so much 💕
